usage: report_noise [-help] [-bumpy_waveform] [-cell_type <string>] [-delay {max min}] [-double_clocking] [-double_switching] [-exclude_failures] [-expand_virtual_attacker_bus] [-failure] [-format <string>] [-gui_victim_nets_file] [-histogram] [-level {vl vh vlu vho}] [-max_threshold <float>] [-merge] [-merge_dir <string>] [-nets <string>] [-output_file <string>] [-output_format {single_line multiple_line single_line_multi_line_attacker}] [-overshoot_undershoot] [-pins <string>] [-precision <integer>] [-quiet_nets] [-remove_status_row <string>] [-report_virtual_attacker_constituents] [-reverse_voltage_change_threshold <float>] [-skip_nets_or_pins_in_header] [-slack <float>] [-sort_by {noise receiver_peak slack cell_type incrDelay delay totDelay}] [-style {default extended}] [-threshold <float>] [-txtfile <string>] [-view <string>] [ [ > | >> ] ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -bumpy_waveform
options.description: generate report for bumpy nets

options.name: -cell_type
options.description: generates glitch report for the user specified cell-type

options.name: -delay
options.description: specify the uncertainty type

options.name: -double_clocking
options.description: enable double clocking reporting

options.name: -double_switching
options.description: enable double switching reporting

options.name: -exclude_failures
options.description: Excludes all failing nets from the glitch report.

options.name: -expand_virtual_attacker_bus
options.description: expand virtual attacker bus bits

options.name: -failure
options.description: output glitch report for failure net only

options.name: -format
options.description: output glitch report with the specified fields

options.name: -gui_victim_nets_file
options.description: output glitch report with the format for GUI interface

options.name: -histogram
options.description: generate glitch histogram

options.name: -level
options.description: specifies level for which report needs to be generated

options.name: -max_threshold
options.description: Specifies the maximum peak noise or receiver peak thresholds to report on.

options.name: -merge
options.description: Generates merged report which provide only worst glitch slack report for each pin/level combination across views

options.name: -merge_dir
options.description: takes a directory name and generates tool compatible database

options.name: -nets
options.description: name of nets to be reported

options.name: -output_file
options.description: output file

options.name: -output_format
options.description: {single_line multiple_line single_line_multi_line_attacker} Specifies if the output format should be on a single line or on multiple lines

options.name: -overshoot_undershoot
options.description: Generates overshoot undershoot glitch report

options.name: -pins
options.description: name of pins to be reported

options.name: -precision
options.description: Specify precision value upto which glitch data is to be printed. Allowed values are 0, 1, 2 and 3.

options.name: -quiet_nets
options.description: Generates quiet attackers report

options.name: -remove_status_row
options.description: Show only active attackers and filter Sb, UF and LC from glitch report

options.name: -report_virtual_attacker_constituents
options.description: Show virtual attacker constituents in report

options.name: -reverse_voltage_change_threshold
options.description: <float> min reverse swing threshold

options.name: -skip_nets_or_pins_in_header
options.description: Generates glitch report without list of nets/pins in header

options.name: -slack
options.description: generate report for bumpy nets based on slack

options.name: -sort_by
options.description: {noise receiver_peak slack cell_type incrDelay delay totDelay} sorting type of the report, <noise|receiver_peak|slack|cell_type> for glitch report and <incrDelay|delay|totDelay> for delay report.

options.name: -style
options.description: style of the report format.

options.name: -threshold
options.description: glitch (in mV) or uncertainty (in ps) filter threshold

options.name: -txtfile
options.description: output file

options.name: -view
options.description: name of view to be reported (string, optional) > <filename> # Redirects output to the specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename> # Redirects output to the specified file
